title: athyrium × yakumonticola
intro: Athyrium × yakumonticola is a sterile hybrid plant, resulting from a cross between the Japanese lady fern (Athyrium yokosukeanum) and the Japanese autumn fern (Athyrium yokosukeanum var. yakusimense). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily used to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is valued for its health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs, and soothing respiratory problems. Athyrium × yakumonticola is often prepared for medicinal use through infusions or decoctions, although its availability and usage may be limited due to its hybrid status and relatively rare cultivation.
